query:
SELECT gj.id, gj.topic_id, gj.status, gj.total_tokens, ROUND(gj.estimated_cost_usd, 5) as cost_usd, gj.latency_ms, gj.retry_count, cp.title, cp.version, cp.status as page_status
FROM generation_jobs gj
LEFT JOIN content_pages cp ON cp.id = gj.page_id
ORDER BY gj.createdAt DESC LIMIT 6
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wCcvzbmKRw9Pje.541775a93539 --database i2oxkxp52Nqaqoc37frtnY --execute SELECT gj.id, gj.topic_id, gj.status, gj.total_tokens, ROUND(gj.estimated_cost_usd, 5) as cost_usd, gj.latency_ms, gj.retry_count, cp.title, cp.version, cp.status as page_status
FROM generation_jobs gj
LEFT JOIN content_pages cp ON cp.id = gj.page_id
ORDER BY gj.createdAt DESC LIMIT 6
